Bug / Task Description: ORSet.Merge destroys the local replica's tag set for any element that also exists in the remote replica. Instead of computing the union of both tag sets, the merge overwrites the local tags with the remote tags, so locally-added concurrent entries are silently dropped. Fix Merge to union tag sets, preserving all local and remote observations.
Commit Subject: fix(crdt): ORSet.Merge must union tag sets, not replace them
